name: Old-Fashioned Chicken Pot Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked and Cut Up Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
2. In a large saucepan, melt butter and cook flour with green onion over medium heat, stirring constantly, until flour is bubbling (about 3 minutes).
3. Stir in the vegetable soup mix blended with milk. Bring just to a boil, then simmer, stirring constantly, for about 5 minutes or until thickened.
4. Stir in chicken, broccoli, cheese, and pepper. Spoon into a lightly greased 1-quart round casserole or soufflé dish.
5. Roll the pastry into a 9-inch circle and arrange over the casserole. Press the pastry around the edge of the casserole to seal; trim off excess pastry, then flute the edges.
6. Brush pastry with egg yolk beaten with water.
7. Make small slits in the pastry with the tip of a sharp knife.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
